query: UPDATE alunos SET isActive = 0 WHERE name LIKE '%Aluno Direto Test%' OR name LIKE 'Test Turma%' OR name LIKE 'Test Turma Null%' OR name LIKE 'Test Turma Number%' OR name LIKE 'Test Turma Undefined%' OR name = 'Maria Dinamar' OR name = 'Usuário Teste' OR email LIKE '%@test.com';
